summary: Project management dashboard (TaskFlow) with light/dark mode support. Light mode has invisible text issue being fixed. Dark mode color scheme being updated to teal.
architectural_notes: Light/dark mode toggle with theme support
Dark mode uses teal color scheme; light mode uses dark text on light backgrounds

existing_features.title: Fix light mode text visibility: ensure all text across every page and component (headings, body text, labels, stat values, sidebar links, card text, etc.) uses dark near-black colors (e.g., #111827 or equivalent dark gray) so they are clearly visible on white/light backgrounds. No light-colored or white text should appear on light backgrounds in light mode.

Update the dark mode color scheme to use teal as the primary accent color throughout the entire application. Replace existing purple/violet/orange accent colors in dark mode with teal shades (e.g., teal-400 #2dd4bf, teal-500 #14b8a6, teal-600 #0d9488). This includes: active sidebar item highlight, buttons (New Task, primary actions), badges, progress bars, icons, chart accent colors, active nav indicators, and any other accent-colored elements. The dark background (near-black) should remain, only the accent/highlight colors change to teal.
